fixture: 035_arithmetic_projection

statement 1:
  sql:
    SELECT 1 + 2
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 3

statement 2:
  sql:
    SELECT 7 - 3
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 4

statement 3:
  sql:
    SELECT 4 * 5
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 20

statement 4:
  sql:
    SELECT 8 + 0
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 8

statement 5:
  sql:
    SELECT 100 - 1
  result:
    query
    columns:
      [0] <unnamed> INTEGER NOT NULL
    rows:
      [0] 99
